title: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada – Transparency - Canada.ca
content:
## Transparency : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Openness, transparency and accountability are guiding principles of the Government of Canada.

## Services and information

### Proactive disclosure
Find information on all our proactive disclosures of departmental information mandated under Bill C-58.

### Access to information and privacy
Gives Canadian citizens, permanent residents or any person (or entity) present in Canada the legal right to obtain information, in any form, that is under the control of a government institution.

### Use of your personal information
Find out how we use your personal information and understand why it’s important to give us accurate information.

### Proactive release of officer decision notes
We now include the officer’s decision notes with the refusal letter to better explain why an application was refused.

### Public consultations and engagement
Find information on ongoing and past public consultations on immigration, refugee and asylum issues that affect Canadians.

### Directions for avoiding complicity in mistreatment by foreign entities
These are our requirements to avoid any risk of complicity in mistreatment when exchanging information with or using information from a foreign entity.
The IRCC Code of Conduct outlines the values and expected behaviours that guide public servants in all activities related to their professional duties.

### Contract terms and conditions
Find out the rights and obligations of parties involved in IRCC contracts.

### Program terms and conditions
Learn more about the terms and conditions related to programs.

### How we manage groups of immigration applications and documents
Learn about the new tools (legislative authorities) introduced through Bill C-12, when they can be used and how decisions are made.

## Digital transparency

### Using advanced analytics and automation
Learn how we’re using advanced analytics, automation, and other technologies to help us process applications faster while protecting your privacy and security.

### Artificial Intelligence Strategy
How IRCC imagines a future where we use artificial intelligence to create new ideas, build trust, and make its programs better.
